## Summary

Please describe what this PR changes.

## Why is this change needed?

Explain the problem being solved.

## Related Issue

Link the related Issue here.

Example:
Closes #12

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Small maintenance improvement
- [ ] Approved feature implementation

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened or linked an Issue first
- [ ] My PR is focused and does not include unrelated changes
- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I followed the existing code style and structure
- [ ] I understand this repository uses a curated contribution model

## Additional notes

Anything reviewers should know?
